scripts.generate-api: cd .. && pydoc-markdown && cp -r docs/docs/api/hydrogym/* docs/docs/api/ && rm -rf docs/docs/api/hydrogym && find docs/docs/api -name '*.md' -exec sed -i.bak 's/{\([a-z_]*\)}/`{\1}`/g' {} \; && find docs/docs/api -name '*.bak' -delete && sed -i.bak 's|api/hydrogym/|api/|g' docs/docs/api/sidebars-api.json && rm -f docs/docs/api/sidebars-api.json.bak && python3 -c "import json; f=open('docs/docs/api/sidebars-api.json'); d=json.load(f); f.close(); f=open('docs/docs/api/sidebars-api.json','w'); json.dump(d['items'][0], f, indent=2)"
